server/src/image_tool/analyze.py :: analyze_image
def analyze_image(data: bytes, source_name: str | None = None) -> dict[str, object]:
    if not data:
        raise ValueError("No image data provided.")

    format_name = _detect_format(data, source_name)
    exif = read_exif(data) if format_name == "jpeg" else None
    has_jpeg_metadata = extract_jpeg_exif_segment(data) is not None if format_name == "jpeg" else False

    width = 0
    height = 0
    channels = 0
    histogram: list[int] = []
    decode_error: str | None = None
    luma_entropy = 0
    dominant_colors: list[dict[str, object]] = []
    average_rgb = {"r": 0, "g": 0, "b": 0}
    average_luminance = 0
    channel_ranges = {
        "r": {"min": 0, "max": 0},
        "g": {"min": 0, "max": 0},
        "b": {"min": 0, "max": 0},
    }
    payload_stats: dict[str, object] | None = None

    try:
        raster = decode_image(data, source_name)
        width = raster.width
        height = raster.height
        channels = raster.channels
        histogram = _luminance_histogram(raster)
        luma_entropy = histogram_entropy(histogram)
        dominant_colors = _dominant_colors(raster)
        average_rgb = _average_rgb(raster)
        average_luminance = _average_lum
